---
name: Ingest CLI
description: Typer CLI for manual doc ingest during dev. v0.4.2. Not for production automation.
type: project
---

Manual doc queuing tool for development and debugging. Not intended for production use — use Batch Scheduler v2 for automated runs.

**Status:** v0.4.2. Stable for dev use.

**Commands:** ingest, status, cancel, list, tail-log.
